what_it_does: Declares a single AXIS dict named 'state' — the time/state axis. It has id/namespace 'state', two discrete fields ('phase' = pending|decided, 'frozen' = live|frozen), value_source 'live', and a desc explaining a surface resolves its treatment against where it is in time.
observations: phase is described as composed from a 'decision_take' mark with 'registry-is-truth'
frozen models a scrubber / point-in-time (live vs frozen)
value_source is 'live' (the axis pulls a current value)
two distinct semantic distinctions (pending/decided vs live/frozen) are bundled into one 'state' axis
standouts: phase value is mark-composed from decision_take, not stored directly — registry is the source of truth
a scrubber/point-in-time notion (frozen) is treated as a first-class axis field
conventions: follows the same AXIS = {id, namespace, fields, value_source, desc} shape as sibling axes files
fields use 'discrete' as the value-kind marker
inline comment annotates the enum values for each field
notes: The 'when' axis: bundles pending-vs-decided (from the decision_take mark) and live-vs-frozen (scrubber) so a surface can resolve treatment by its position in time.
questions: What consumes value_source 'live' and how is the decision_take mark read into 'phase'?
Why are two separable distinctions (phase, frozen) collapsed into one axis rather than two?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — the module docstring says 'STATE/time axis (when)' and the dict encodes exactly that.
apparent_themes: time/point-in-time as a resolvable surface dimension
intention_signals: Trying to make 'when in time' a uniform, declared axis that surfaces resolve against — so pending/decided treatment and time-travel/freezing are handled by the same composition machinery rather than ad-hoc per surface.
novelty: Treating a temporal scrubber position (live/frozen) as an axis field alongside decision-phase.
contribution: Contributes the time/state axis declaration — the named slot that lets surfaces resolve their treatment by decision-phase and by point-in-time, with phase derived from the decision_take mark.
summary_for_embedding: A declarative AXIS dict 'state' encoding the time dimension with discrete fields phase (pending|decided, composed from the decision_take mark) and frozen (live|frozen scrubber).
intention_for_embedding: To give surfaces a uniform 'when' axis so they resolve their treatment by decision-phase and point-in-time position.
